query_name: Get Available PODs for Date Range
author: Claude
description: Retrieve distinct POD values active in a date range (lightning fast)

output_columns.name: podid
output_columns.description: POD code (FC, DT, CSO, etc.) or 'Total'

output_columns.name: podname
output_columns.description: POD display name (Counter, Drive-Thru, etc.) or 'Total'

output_columns.name: SortOrder
output_columns.description: Sequential sort order (0 = Total, 1,2,3... = PODs alphabetically)
